contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 1
contoh.q: Tentukan keenam perbandingan trigonometri untuk sudut $\alpha$ dan $\beta$ dari segitiga siku-siku $ABC$ dengan $a = BC = 3$, $b = AC = 4$, $c = AB = 5$!
contoh.p:
Diketahui: $a = BC = 3$, $b = AC = 4$, $c = AB = 5$ (segitiga siku-siku 3-4-5).

UtamaKebalikan
$\alpha$$\beta$$\alpha$$\beta$
$\sin$$\dfrac{3}{5}$$\dfrac{4}{5}$$\csc$$\dfrac{5}{3}$$\dfrac{5}{4}$
$\cos$$\dfrac{4}{5}$$\dfrac{3}{5}$$\sec$$\dfrac{5}{4}$$\dfrac{5}{3}$
$\tan$$\dfrac{3}{4}$$\dfrac{4}{3}$$\cot$$\dfrac{4}{3}$$\dfrac{3}{4}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 2
contoh.q: Diketahui segitiga $ABC$ siku-siku di $B$, dengan $AB = \sqrt{12}$ cm dan $AC = 4$ cm. Tentukan $\cos A$, $\tan C$, dan $\csc A$!
contoh.p:
Cari $BC$ dengan Pythagoras:

$$BC^2 = AC^2 - AB^2 = 16 - 12 = 4 \implies BC = 2 \text{ cm}$$
  1. $\cos A = \dfrac{AB}{AC} = \dfrac{\sqrt{12}}{4} = \dfrac{\sqrt{3}}{2}$
  2. $\tan C = \dfrac{AB}{BC} = \dfrac{\sqrt{12}}{2} = \sqrt{3}$
  3. $\csc A = \dfrac{AC}{BC} = \dfrac{4}{2} = 2$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 3
contoh.q: Diketahui segitiga $PQR$ siku-siku di $Q$, dengan $\sin P = \dfrac{5}{13}$. Tentukan $\cos P$, $\tan P$, $\cot R$, dan $\sec R$!
contoh.p:
Dari $\sin P = \dfrac{5}{13}$, maka sisi depan $P = QR = 5$ dan sisi miring $PR = 13$.

Sisi samping $P$: $PQ = \sqrt{13^2 - 5^2} = \sqrt{144} = 12$.

  1. $\cos P = \dfrac{PQ}{PR} = \dfrac{12}{13}$,   $\tan P = \dfrac{QR}{PQ} = \dfrac{5}{12}$
  2. Untuk sudut $R$: sisi depan $= PQ = 12$, sisi samping $= QR = 5$, miring $= 13$.
  3. $\cot R = \dfrac{5}{12}$,   $\sec R = \dfrac{13}{5}$

Perhatikan: $\tan P = \cot R$, sesuai relasi komplementer $P + R = 90^\circ$.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 4
contoh.q: Jika koordinat $A(6, 3)$ dan $\alpha$ adalah sudut antara $OA$ dan sumbu $X$, maka nilai $\sin\alpha$ adalah …
contoh.p:
Dari koordinat $A(6, 3)$: $x = 6$, $y = 3$.

Hitung sisi miring:

$$OA = \sqrt{6^2 + 3^2} = \sqrt{36 + 9} = \sqrt{45} = 3\sqrt{5}$$

Karena $\sin\alpha = \dfrac{y}{OA}$, maka:

$$\sin\alpha = \frac{3}{3\sqrt{5}} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{5}} = \frac{\sqrt{5}}{5}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 5
contoh.q: Sebuah pohon berdiri tegak di tepi sungai. Dari titik $A$ di seberang sungai, sudut elevasi puncak pohon adalah $30^\circ$. Pengamat kemudian mundur sejauh 20 m, dan sudut elevasi menjadi $15^\circ$. Tentukan tinggi pohon!  (Gunakan: $\tan 15^\circ = 2 - \sqrt{3}$, $\tan 30^\circ = \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{3}}$)
contoh.p:
Misalkan tinggi pohon $= h$ dan lebar sungai $= d$.

$$\tan 30^\circ = \frac{h}{d} \implies d = h\sqrt{3}$$
$$\tan 15^\circ = \frac{h}{d+20} \implies d + 20 = \frac{h}{2-\sqrt{3}} = h(2+\sqrt{3})$$

Substitusi $d = h\sqrt{3}$:

$$h\sqrt{3} + 20 = h(2+\sqrt{3}) \implies 20 = 2h \implies \boxed{h = 10 \text{ m}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 6
contoh.q:
Sebuah tangga disandarkan pada dinding vertikal. Diketahui $\tan\alpha = \dfrac{3}{4}$ di mana $\alpha$ adalah sudut antara tangga dan lantai, serta panjang tangga adalah 10 m. Tentukan:

  1. Tinggi puncak tangga pada dinding ($t$)
  2. Jarak kaki tangga dari dinding ($d$)
  3. Nilai $\sin\alpha$, $\cos\alpha$, dan $\csc\alpha$
contoh.p:
Dari $\tan\alpha = \dfrac{3}{4}$, misalkan sisi depan $= 3k$ dan sisi samping $= 4k$. Sisi miring $= 5k$. Karena panjang tangga $= 10$ m: $5k = 10 \implies k = 2$.

  1. Tinggi puncak tangga: $t = 3k = 6$ m
  2. Jarak kaki tangga: $d = 4k = 8$ m
  3. $\sin\alpha = \dfrac{6}{10} = \dfrac{3}{5}$,   $\cos\alpha = \dfrac{8}{10} = \dfrac{4}{5}$,   $\csc\alpha = \dfrac{10}{6} = \dfrac{5}{3}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 7
contoh.q:
Tentukan nilai dari:

  1. $6\sin 60^\circ + 8\cos 30^\circ - 2\tan 60^\circ$
  2. $12\sin 30^\circ \cdot \cos 30^\circ \cdot \tan 45^\circ$
  3. $\sec 30^\circ$, $\csc 45^\circ$
contoh.p:
1. $6 \cdot \dfrac{1}{2}\sqrt{3} + 8 \cdot \dfrac{1}{2}\sqrt{3} - 2\sqrt{3} = 3\sqrt{3} + 4\sqrt{3} - 2\sqrt{3} = \mathbf{5\sqrt{3}}$
  2. $12 \cdot \dfrac{1}{2} \cdot \dfrac{1}{2}\sqrt{3} \cdot 1 = \mathbf{3\sqrt{3}}$
  3. $\sec 30^\circ = \dfrac{1}{\cos 30^\circ} = \dfrac{2}{\sqrt{3}} = \dfrac{2\sqrt{3}}{3}$  ;   $\csc 45^\circ = \dfrac{1}{\sin 45^\circ} = \sqrt{2}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 8
contoh.q: Tentukan nilai dari: $\dfrac{\sin^2 30^\circ - \cos^2 30^\circ + 2\sin 45^\circ \sin 45^\circ}{4\cos^2 30^\circ - 2}$
contoh.p:
Substitusikan nilai sudut istimewa: $\sin 30^\circ = \dfrac{1}{2}$, $\cos 30^\circ = \dfrac{\sqrt{3}}{2}$, $\sin 45^\circ = \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}$.

Hitung pembilang:

$$\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)^2 - \left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right)^2 + 2 \cdot \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \cdot \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} = \frac{1}{4} - \frac{3}{4} + 1 = \frac{1}{2}$$

Hitung penyebut:

$$4 \cdot \left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right)^2 - 2 = 4 \cdot \frac{3}{4} - 2 = 1$$
$$\text{Hasil} = \frac{\tfrac{1}{2}}{1} = \boxed{\dfrac{1}{2}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 9
contoh.q: Sebuah segitiga $ABC$ siku-siku di $B$. Diketahui $\angle A = 30^\circ$ dan sisi $BC = \sqrt{12}$ cm. Tentukan panjang $AC$!
contoh.p:
Sisi $BC$ adalah depan sudut $A$, dan sisi $AC$ adalah sisi miring.

$$\sin 30^\circ = \frac{BC}{AC} \implies \frac{1}{2} = \frac{\sqrt{12}}{AC} \implies AC = 2\sqrt{12} = \boxed{4\sqrt{3} \text{ cm}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 10
contoh.q: Seseorang melihat puncak menara dengan sudut elevasi $60^\circ$. Jika tinggi menara 90 m, tentukan jarak orang tersebut ke kaki menara!
contoh.p:
Misalkan jarak orang ke menara $= d$.

$$\tan 60^\circ = \frac{90}{d} \implies \sqrt{3} = \frac{90}{d} \implies d = \frac{90}{\sqrt{3}} = \frac{90\sqrt{3}}{3} = \boxed{30\sqrt{3} \text{ m}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 11
contoh.q: Diketahui $\angle DAC = \angle BAC = 30^\circ$, $AB = 6$, $DC = 2\sqrt{5}$, sudut siku-siku di $B$ (pada $\triangle ABC$) dan di $D$ (pada $\triangle ADC$). Tentukan nilai $p = AD$!
contoh.p:
Langkah 1: Cari $AC$ menggunakan $\triangle ABC$.

$$\cos 30^\circ = \frac{AB}{AC} \implies \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} = \frac{6}{AC} \implies AC = \frac{12}{\sqrt{3}} = 4\sqrt{3}$$

Langkah 2: Cari $AD = p$ menggunakan $\triangle ADC$ (Pythagoras, siku-siku di $D$).

$$p^2 + (2\sqrt{5})^2 = (4\sqrt{3})^2 \implies p^2 + 20 = 48 \implies p^2 = 28 \implies \boxed{p = 2\sqrt{7}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 12
contoh.q: Diketahui segitiga $ABC$ dengan $\angle B = 45^\circ$ dan $CT$ adalah garis tinggi dari titik $C$. Jika $BC = a$ dan $AT = \dfrac{3}{2}a\sqrt{2}$, tentukan panjang $AC$!
contoh.p:
Langkah 1: Cari $CT$ dari $\triangle BCT$ (siku-siku di $T$, $\angle CBT = 45^\circ$, $BC = a$).

$$CT = BC \cdot \sin 45^\circ = a \cdot \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} = \frac{a\sqrt{2}}{2}$$

Langkah 2: Cari $AC$ dari $\triangle ACT$ (siku-siku di $T$).

$$AC^2 = AT^2 + CT^2 = \left(\frac{3a\sqrt{2}}{2}\right)^2 + \left(\frac{a\sqrt{2}}{2}\right)^2 = \frac{18a^2}{4} + \frac{2a^2}{4} = 5a^2 \implies \boxed{AC = a\sqrt{5}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 13
contoh.q: Seberkas sinar datang dengan sudut datang $45^\circ$, menembus plat kaca setebal $12$ cm membentuk sudut bias $30^\circ$. Tentukan lebar penyimpangan cahaya ($t$)!  (Gunakan: $\sin 15^\circ = \dfrac{1}{4}(\sqrt{6}-\sqrt{2})$)
contoh.p:
Diketahui: $d = 12$ cm, $i = 45^\circ$, $r = 30^\circ$. Rumus: $t = \dfrac{d \cdot \sin(i - r)}{\cos r}$.

$$t = \frac{12 \cdot \sin(45^\circ - 30^\circ)}{\cos 30^\circ} = \frac{12 \cdot \frac{1}{4}(\sqrt{6}-\sqrt{2})}{\frac{1}{2}\sqrt{3}} = \frac{3(\sqrt{6}-\sqrt{2})}{\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}} = \frac{6(\sqrt{6}-\sqrt{2})}{\sqrt{3}}$$
$$t = \frac{6\sqrt{6}}{\sqrt{3}} - \frac{6\sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{3}} = 6\sqrt{2} - 2\sqrt{6} \implies \boxed{t = 6\sqrt{2} - 2\sqrt{6} \text{ cm}}$$

sections.title: Rumus Perbandingan Trigonometri di Semua Kuadran

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 14
contoh.q:
Tentukan nilai dari ekspresi berikut menggunakan aturan pelurus (fungsi tetap):

  1. $\cos 150^\circ$
  2. $\sin 225^\circ$
  3. $\tan 240^\circ$
  4. $\csc 300^\circ$
  5. $\cot 120^\circ$
contoh.p:
1. $\cos 150^\circ = \cos(180^\circ - 30^\circ)$. Kuadran II: $\cos < 0$. $\implies -\cos 30^\circ = -\dfrac{\sqrt{3}}{2}$
  2. $\sin 225^\circ = \sin(180^\circ + 45^\circ)$. Kuadran III: $\sin < 0$. $\implies -\sin 45^\circ = -\dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2}$
  3. $\tan 240^\circ = \tan(180^\circ + 60^\circ)$. Kuadran III: $\tan > 0$. $\implies +\tan 60^\circ = \sqrt{3}$
  4. $\sin 300^\circ = \sin(360^\circ - 60^\circ) = -\sin 60^\circ = -\dfrac{\sqrt{3}}{2}$. $\implies \csc 300^\circ = -\dfrac{2\sqrt{3}}{3}$
  5. $\tan 120^\circ = \tan(180^\circ - 60^\circ) = -\tan 60^\circ = -\sqrt{3}$. $\implies \cot 120^\circ = -\dfrac{\sqrt{3}}{3}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 15
contoh.q:
Tentukan nilai dari ekspresi berikut menggunakan aturan penyiku (fungsi bertukar):

  1. $\sin(90^\circ + 60^\circ)$
  2. $\cos(270^\circ - 30^\circ)$
  3. $\tan(90^\circ - 45^\circ)$
contoh.p:
1. Kuadran II, penyiku → $\sin \to \cos$. Tanda: $\sin > 0$ di kuadran II. $\implies +\cos 60^\circ = \dfrac{1}{2}$
  2. Kuadran III, penyiku → $\cos \to \sin$. Tanda: $\cos < 0$ di kuadran III. $\implies -\sin 30^\circ = -\dfrac{1}{2}$
  3. Kuadran I, penyiku → $\tan \to \cot$. Tanda: $\tan > 0$ di kuadran I. $\implies +\cot 45^\circ = 1$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 16
contoh.q:
Tentukan nilai dari:

  1. $\cos 930^\circ$
  2. $\sin 1215^\circ$
  3. $\tan 600^\circ$
contoh.p:
1. $\cos 930^\circ = \cos(930^\circ - 720^\circ) = \cos 210^\circ = \cos(180^\circ + 30^\circ) = -\cos 30^\circ = -\dfrac{1}{2}\sqrt{3}$
  2. $\sin 1215^\circ = \sin(1215^\circ - 1080^\circ) = \sin 135^\circ = \sin(180^\circ - 45^\circ) = \sin 45^\circ = \dfrac{1}{2}\sqrt{2}$
  3. $\tan 600^\circ = \tan(600^\circ - 360^\circ) = \tan 240^\circ = \tan(180^\circ + 60^\circ) = \tan 60^\circ = \sqrt{3}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 17
contoh.q:
Tentukan nilai dari:

  1. $\sin(-30^\circ)$
  2. $\cos(-135^\circ)$
  3. $\tan(-240^\circ)$
  4. $\sin(-315^\circ)$
contoh.p:
1. $\sin(-30^\circ) = -\sin 30^\circ = -\dfrac{1}{2}$
  2. $\cos(-135^\circ) = \cos 135^\circ = \cos(180^\circ - 45^\circ) = -\cos 45^\circ = -\dfrac{1}{2}\sqrt{2}$
  3. $\tan(-240^\circ) = -\tan 240^\circ = -\tan(180^\circ + 60^\circ) = -\tan 60^\circ = -\sqrt{3}$
  4. $\sin(-315^\circ) = -\sin 315^\circ = -\sin(360^\circ - 45^\circ) = -(-\sin 45^\circ) = \dfrac{1}{2}\sqrt{2}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 18
contoh.q: Sederhanakan: $\dfrac{\sin(-\alpha) \cdot \cos(-\alpha)}{\tan(-\alpha)}$
contoh.p: $$\frac{(-\sin\alpha)(\cos\alpha)}{-\tan\alpha} = \frac{-\sin\alpha\cos\alpha}{-\dfrac{\sin\alpha}{\cos\alpha}} = \frac{-\sin\alpha\cos\alpha \cdot \cos\alpha}{-\sin\alpha} = \boxed{\cos^2\alpha}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 19
contoh.q: Jika $\cos\alpha = \dfrac{1}{3}$ dan $\alpha$ berada di kuadran IV, tentukan $\sin\alpha$, $\tan\alpha$, dan $\sec\alpha$!
contoh.p:
Dari $\cos\alpha = \dfrac{1}{3}$, segitiga bantu: samping $= 1$, miring $= 3$, depan $= \sqrt{9-1} = 2\sqrt{2}$.

Kuadran IV: $\sin\alpha < 0$. Jadi:

$$\sin\alpha = -\frac{2\sqrt{2}}{3}, \qquad \tan\alpha = -2\sqrt{2}, \qquad \sec\alpha = 3$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 20
contoh.q: Diketahui $\tan A = -\dfrac{p}{\sqrt{1-p^2}}$ dan $90^\circ < A < 180^\circ$. Tentukan nilai $\sin A$!
contoh.p:
Dari $\tan A = -\dfrac{p}{\sqrt{1-p^2}}$, sisi depan $= p$, samping $= \sqrt{1-p^2}$. Sisi miring: $r = \sqrt{p^2 + (1-p^2)} = 1$.

Kuadran II: $\sin A > 0$. $\implies \sin A = \dfrac{p}{1} = \boxed{p}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 21
contoh.q: Diketahui $\tan(x + 90^\circ) = -0{,}75$ dan $x$ adalah sudut lancip. Tentukan nilai $\cos(90^\circ - x)$!
contoh.p:
Aturan penyiku: $\tan(x + 90^\circ) = -\cot x$. Maka $-\cot x = -\dfrac{3}{4} \implies \cot x = \dfrac{3}{4} \implies \tan x = \dfrac{4}{3}$.

Segitiga bantu ($x$ lancip): depan $= 4$, samping $= 3$, miring $= 5$. Relasi komplementer: $\cos(90^\circ - x) = \sin x$.

$$\sin x = \frac{4}{5} \implies \cos(90^\circ - x) = \boxed{\frac{4}{5}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 22
contoh.q: Sederhanakan: $\dfrac{\sin(270^\circ - \alpha) \cdot \tan(180^\circ + \alpha) \cdot \sec(-\alpha)}{\cos(90^\circ + \alpha) \cdot \cot(360^\circ - \alpha)}$
contoh.p:
Terapkan aturan pelurus/penyiku pada setiap faktor:

$$\sin(270^\circ - \alpha) = -\cos\alpha, \quad \tan(180^\circ + \alpha) = \tan\alpha, \quad \sec(-\alpha) = \sec\alpha$$
$$\cos(90^\circ + \alpha) = -\sin\alpha, \quad \cot(360^\circ - \alpha) = -\cot\alpha$$
$$= \frac{(-\cos\alpha)(\tan\alpha)\left(\dfrac{1}{\cos\alpha}\right)}{(-\sin\alpha)\!\left(-\dfrac{\cos\alpha}{\sin\alpha}\right)} = \frac{-\tan\alpha}{\cos\alpha} = \boxed{-\frac{\sin\alpha}{\cos^2\alpha}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 23
contoh.q:
Diketahui $\sin\alpha = \dfrac{3}{5}$ dan $180^\circ < \alpha < 270^\circ$.

  1. Tentukan nilai semua perbandingan trigonometri dari $\alpha$.
  2. Tentukan nilai dari $\sin(180^\circ + \alpha) + \cos(90^\circ - \alpha) - \tan(360^\circ - \alpha)$.
  3. Jika $\beta = 90^\circ - \alpha$, tentukan nilai $\cos\beta$ dan identifikasi kuadran $\beta$.
contoh.p:
1. Kuadran III: $\sin\alpha < 0$. Jadi $\sin\alpha = -\dfrac{3}{5}$. Segitiga bantu: depan $= 3$, miring $= 5$, samping $= 4$. Karena Kuadran III: $\cos\alpha = -\dfrac{4}{5}$, $\tan\alpha = \dfrac{3}{4}$, $\csc\alpha = -\dfrac{5}{3}$, $\sec\alpha = -\dfrac{5}{4}$, $\cot\alpha = \dfrac{4}{3}$.
  2. $-\sin\alpha + \sin\alpha - (-\tan\alpha) = 0 + \tan\alpha = \dfrac{3}{4}$
  3. $\cos\beta = \cos(90^\circ - \alpha) = \sin\alpha = -\dfrac{3}{5}$. Kuadran III (karena $\alpha \in (180^\circ, 270^\circ)$ maka $\beta \in (-180^\circ, -90^\circ)$).

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 24
contoh.q: Sederhanakan: $\dfrac{\sin\alpha}{\csc\alpha} + \dfrac{\cos\alpha}{\sec\alpha}$
contoh.p: $$\sin\alpha \cdot \sin\alpha + \cos\alpha \cdot \cos\alpha = \sin^2\alpha + \cos^2\alpha = \boxed{1}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 25
contoh.q: Jika $\sin\alpha = \dfrac{4}{5}$ dan $\alpha$ di kuadran II, tentukan nilai $\tan^2\alpha + \sec^2\alpha$!
contoh.p:
$\cos^2\alpha = 1 - \dfrac{16}{25} = \dfrac{9}{25}$. Kuadran II: $\cos\alpha = -\dfrac{3}{5}$. Maka $\tan\alpha = -\dfrac{4}{3}$, $\sec\alpha = -\dfrac{5}{3}$.

$$\tan^2\alpha + \sec^2\alpha = \frac{16}{9} + \frac{25}{9} = \boxed{\frac{41}{9}}$$

Alternatif cepat: $2\tan^2\alpha + 1 = 2 \cdot \dfrac{16}{9} + 1 = \dfrac{41}{9}$ ✓

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 26
contoh.q: Buktikan bahwa $\tan^2\alpha - \sin^2\alpha = \tan^2\alpha \cdot \sin^2\alpha$!
contoh.p: $$\text{Ruas kiri} = \frac{\sin^2\alpha}{\cos^2\alpha} - \sin^2\alpha = \sin^2\alpha\!\left(\frac{1}{\cos^2\alpha} - 1\right) = \frac{\sin^2\alpha(1 - \cos^2\alpha)}{\cos^2\alpha} = \frac{\sin^2\alpha \cdot \sin^2\alpha}{\cos^2\alpha} = \tan^2\alpha \cdot \sin^2\alpha \quad\square$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 27
contoh.q: Buktikan bahwa $3 + 5\sin^2\alpha = 8 - 5\cos^2\alpha$!
contoh.p: $$\text{Ruas kiri} = 3 + 5(1 - \cos^2\alpha) = 3 + 5 - 5\cos^2\alpha = 8 - 5\cos^2\alpha = \text{Ruas kanan} \quad\square$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 28
contoh.q: Buktikan bahwa $\sec^2\alpha - \sin^2\alpha \cdot \sec^2\alpha = 1$!
contoh.p: $$\text{Ruas kiri} = \sec^2\alpha(1 - \sin^2\alpha) = \sec^2\alpha \cdot \cos^2\alpha = \frac{1}{\cos^2\alpha} \cdot \cos^2\alpha = 1 = \text{Ruas kanan} \quad\square$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 29
contoh.q: Buktikan bahwa $\dfrac{1-\sin\alpha}{\cos\alpha} = \dfrac{\cos\alpha}{1+\sin\alpha}$!
contoh.p: $$\text{Ruas kiri} = \frac{1-\sin\alpha}{\cos\alpha} \cdot \frac{1+\sin\alpha}{1+\sin\alpha} = \frac{1 - \sin^2\alpha}{\cos\alpha(1+\sin\alpha)} = \frac{\cos^2\alpha}{\cos\alpha(1+\sin\alpha)} = \frac{\cos\alpha}{1+\sin\alpha} = \text{Ruas kanan} \quad\square$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 30
contoh.q: Buktikan bahwa $\tan\alpha - \cot\alpha = \dfrac{1 - 2\cos^2\alpha}{\sin\alpha\cos\alpha}$!
contoh.p: $$\tan\alpha - \cot\alpha = \frac{\sin\alpha}{\cos\alpha} - \frac{\cos\alpha}{\sin\alpha} = \frac{\sin^2\alpha - \cos^2\alpha}{\sin\alpha\cos\alpha} = \frac{(1 - \cos^2\alpha) - \cos^2\alpha}{\sin\alpha\cos\alpha} = \frac{1 - 2\cos^2\alpha}{\sin\alpha\cos\alpha} \quad\square$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 31
contoh.q: Buktikan bahwa $\dfrac{\sec\alpha - \csc\alpha}{\sec\alpha + \csc\alpha} = \dfrac{\tan\alpha - 1}{\tan\alpha + 1}$!
contoh.p: $$\frac{\dfrac{1}{\cos\alpha} - \dfrac{1}{\sin\alpha}}{\dfrac{1}{\cos\alpha} + \dfrac{1}{\sin\alpha}} = \frac{\sin\alpha - \cos\alpha}{\sin\alpha + \cos\alpha} = \frac{\dfrac{\sin\alpha}{\cos\alpha} - 1}{\dfrac{\sin\alpha}{\cos\alpha} + 1} = \frac{\tan\alpha - 1}{\tan\alpha + 1} \quad\square$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 32
contoh.q: Buktikan bahwa $\dfrac{1}{1-\sin\alpha} + \dfrac{1}{1+\sin\alpha} = 2\sec^2\alpha$!
contoh.p: $$\text{Ruas kiri} = \frac{(1+\sin\alpha) + (1-\sin\alpha)}{(1-\sin\alpha)(1+\sin\alpha)} = \frac{2}{1-\sin^2\alpha} = \frac{2}{\cos^2\alpha} = 2\sec^2\alpha = \text{Ruas kanan} \quad\square$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 33
contoh.q: Jika $\cot\alpha = \dfrac{5}{12}$ dan $\alpha$ di kuadran III, tentukan nilai $\csc^2\alpha - \sec^2\alpha$!
contoh.p:
Segitiga bantu: samping $= 5$, depan $= 12$, miring $= 13$. Kuadran III: $\sin\alpha = -\dfrac{12}{13}$, $\cos\alpha = -\dfrac{5}{13}$.

$$\csc^2\alpha - \sec^2\alpha = \frac{169}{144} - \frac{169}{25} = 169\!\left(\frac{1}{144} - \frac{1}{25}\right) = 169 \cdot \frac{-119}{3600} = \boxed{-\frac{20111}{3600}}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 34
contoh.q: Jika $\sin\alpha + \cos\alpha = m$ dan $\sec\alpha + \csc\alpha = n$, tunjukkan bahwa $n(m^2 - 1) = 2m$!
contoh.p:
Kuadratkan $m$: $m^2 = 1 + 2\sin\alpha\cos\alpha \implies m^2 - 1 = 2\sin\alpha\cos\alpha$.

$n = \dfrac{1}{\cos\alpha} + \dfrac{1}{\sin\alpha} = \dfrac{\sin\alpha + \cos\alpha}{\sin\alpha\cos\alpha} = \dfrac{m}{\sin\alpha\cos\alpha}$.

$$n(m^2 - 1) = \frac{m}{\sin\alpha\cos\alpha} \cdot 2\sin\alpha\cos\alpha = 2m \quad\square$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 35
contoh.q: Buktikan bahwa: $\dfrac{\sin\alpha + \cos\alpha}{\sin\alpha - \cos\alpha} + \dfrac{\sin\alpha - \cos\alpha}{\sin\alpha + \cos\alpha} = \dfrac{2}{1 - 2\cos^2\alpha}$
contoh.p:
Samakan penyebut:

$$\text{Pembilang} = (\sin\alpha+\cos\alpha)^2 + (\sin\alpha-\cos\alpha)^2 = 2\sin^2\alpha + 2\cos^2\alpha = 2$$
$$\text{Penyebut} = \sin^2\alpha - \cos^2\alpha = (1-\cos^2\alpha) - \cos^2\alpha = 1 - 2\cos^2\alpha$$
$$\text{Ruas kiri} = \frac{2}{1-2\cos^2\alpha} = \text{Ruas kanan} \quad\square$$
